title: KBAC Flooring opens in George, expanding its Western Cape reach
description: BUSINESS NEWS - KBAC Flooring is proud to...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - KBAC Flooring is proud to announce the opening of its new showroom and warehouse in George, marking a significant milestone in the company's 56-year legacy of providing premium flooring solutions.

With established branches in Johannesburg and Cape Town and a new location soon to be launched in Ballito, this expansion extends KBAC's trusted expertise to the heart of the Garden Route.


> The showroom, located at Unit 4, Steinhoff Park, on the corner of PW Botha Boulevard and Ossie Urban Road in Tamsui Industria, has been designed as an inviting, collaborative space.


Tailored for clients, designers, architects and flooring professionals, it serves as a hub for creativity, product discovery and expert consultation.

A relaxed, homely atmosphere complete with an in-showroom coffee bar makes it the ideal setting to explore a wide range of residential and commercial flooring solutions.

KBAC Flooring is a trusted partner to both the flooring trade and individual customers, offering a premium range of products for every type of project.

We supply flooring retailers, contractors and installers with globally renowned brands such as Bolon, Chilewich, Ege, Norament and Interface, along with our exclusive Vanguard Collection and Spindle & Loom. We also proudly support local suppliers, showcasing a diverse selection of high-quality products sourced right here in South Africa. Whether you're a homeowner enhancing your space or a professional delivering large-scale commercial projects, KBAC offers the quality, variety and expert guidance you need to bring your vision to life.

Installation servicesBeyond its product range, KBAC provides professional turnkey installation services. From the initial selection to final installation, every project is managed with precision and care. Backed by decades of industry experience, the KBAC team ensures a seamless and stress-free process, delivering results that reflect both quality and craftsmanship.

Under the guidance of KBAC's leadership team, the company continues to grow its national footprint while upholding its long-standing reputation for excellence, innovation and customer-focused service.


> The opening of the George branch reinforces KBAC's mission to bring world-class flooring solutions to communities across the Garden Route and throughout South Africa.


KBAC Flooring welcomes you to explore the new George showroom, relax with a coffee and discover what sets us apart; the team is ready to help bring your flooring vision to life.

To learn more or book a consultation, contact the George branch manager, André de Wet, on 075 287 2781/[email protected], or visit www.kbacflooring.co.za or www.vanguardcollection.co.za for more information.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
